1371	          case(uop_funct3) 
1372	            OPIVV,
1373	            OPIVX,
1374	            OPIVI: begin
1375	              case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
1376	                VADC,
1377	                VSBC: begin
1378	                  case(vs2_eew)
1379	                    EEW8: begin                    
1380	                      cin[4*j]   = v0_data_in_use[4*j];
1381	                      cin[4*j+1] = v0_data_in_use[4*j+1];
1382	                      cin[4*j+2] = v0_data_in_use[4*j+2];
1383	                      cin[4*j+3] = v0_data_in_use[4*j+3];
1384	                    end
1385	                    EEW16: begin
1386	                      cin[4*j]   = v0_data_in_use[2*j];
1387	                      cin[4*j+1] = 'b0;
1388	                      cin[4*j+2] = v0_data_in_use[2*j+1];
1389	                      cin[4*j+3] = 'b0;
1390	                    end
1391	                    EEW32: begin
1392	                      cin[4*j]   = v0_data_in_use[j];
1393	                      cin[4*j+1] = 'b0;
1394	                      cin[4*j+2] = 'b0;
1395	                      cin[4*j+3] = 'b0;
1396	                    end
1397	                  endcase
1398	                end
1399	              endcase
1400	            end
1401	          endcase
1402	        end
1403	      end
1404	    end
1405	
1406	    // get opcode for f_addsub
1407	    always_comb begin
1408	      // initial the data
1409	      opcode = ADDSUB_VADD;
1410	
1411	      if(CMP_SUPPORT) begin
1412	        // prepare source data
1413	        case(uop_funct3) 
1414	          OPIVV,
1415	          OPIVX,
1416	          OPIVI: begin
1417	            case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)    
1418	              VADD,
1419	              VADC,
1420	              VMADC,
1421	              VSADDU,
1422	              VSADD: begin
1423	                opcode = ADDSUB_VADD;
1424	              end
1425	
1426	              VSUB,
1427	              VRSUB,
1428	              VSBC,
1429	              VMSBC,
1430	              VMSEQ,
1431	              VMSNE,
1432	              VMSLTU,
1433	              VMSLT,
1434	              VMSLEU,
1435	              VMSLE,
1436	              VMSGTU,
1437	              VMSGT,
1438	              VSSUBU,
1439	              VSSUB,
1440	              VMINU,
1441	              VMIN,
1442	              VMAXU,
1443	              VMAX: begin
1444	                opcode = ADDSUB_VSUB;
1445	              end
1446	            endcase
1447	          end
1448	          OPMVV,
1449	          OPMVX: begin
1450	            case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)    
1451	              VWADDU,
1452	              VWADD,
1453	              VWADDU_W,
1454	              VWADD_W,
1455	              VAADDU,
1456	              VAADD: begin
1457	                opcode = ADDSUB_VADD;
1458	              end
1459	              VWSUBU,
1460	              VWSUB,
1461	              VWSUBU_W,
1462	              VWSUB_W,
1463	              VASUBU,
1464	              VASUB: begin
1465	                opcode = ADDSUB_VSUB;
1466	              end
1467	            endcase
1468	          end
1469	        endcase
1470	      end
1471	      else begin
1472	        // prepare source data
1473	        case(uop_funct3) 
1474	          OPIVV,
1475	          OPIVX,
1476	          OPIVI: begin
1477	            case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)    
1478	              VADD,
1479	              VADC,
1480	              VSADDU,
1481	              VSADD: begin
1482	                opcode = ADDSUB_VADD;
1483	              end
1484	
1485	              VSUB,
1486	              VRSUB,
1487	              VSBC,
1488	              VSSUBU,
1489	              VSSUB,
1490	              VMINU,
1491	              VMIN,
1492	              VMAXU,
1493	              VMAX: begin
1494	                opcode = ADDSUB_VSUB;
1495	              end
1496	            endcase
1497	          end
1498	          OPMVV,
1499	          OPMVX: begin
1500	            case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)    
1501	              VWADDU,
1502	              VWADD,
1503	              VWADDU_W,
1504	              VWADD_W,
1505	              VAADDU,
1506	              VAADD: begin
1507	                opcode = ADDSUB_VADD;
1508	              end
1509	              VWSUBU,
1510	              VWSUB,
1511	              VWSUBU_W,
1512	              VWSUB_W,
1513	              VASUBU,
1514	              VASUB: begin
1515	                opcode = ADDSUB_VSUB;
1516	              end
1517	            endcase
1518	          end
1519	        endcase
1520	      end
1521	    end
1522	  endgenerate
1523	
1524	//    
1525	// calculate the result
1526	//
1527	  // for add and sub instructions
1528	  always_comb begin
1529	    for(int i=0;i<`VLENB;i++) begin: VADDSUB_PROD8
1530	      if (opcode==ADDSUB_VADD) 
1531	        {cout8[i],product8[i]} = (`BYTE_WIDTH+1)'(src2_data[i]) + (`BYTE_WIDTH+1)'(src1_data[i]) + cin[i];
1532	      else //(opcode==ADDSUB_VSUB)
1533	        {cout8[i],product8[i]} = (`BYTE_WIDTH+1)'(src2_data[i]) - (`BYTE_WIDTH+1)'(src1_data[i]) - cin[i];      
1534	    end
1535	  end
1536	
1537	//
1538	// submit result to ROB
1539	//
1540	  `ifdef TB_SUPPORT
1541	    assign result.uop_pc          = alu_uop.uop_pc;
1542	  `endif
1543	    assign result.rob_entry       = alu_uop.rob_entry;
1544	    assign result.opcode          = opcode;
1545	    assign result.uop_funct6      = alu_uop.uop_funct6;
1546	    assign result.uop_funct3      = alu_uop.uop_funct3;
1547	    assign result.is_addsub       = 'b1;
1548	    assign result.is_cmp          = alu_uop.is_cmp;
1549	    assign result.vstart          = alu_uop.vstart;
1550	    assign result.vl              = alu_uop.vl;
1551	    assign result.vm              = alu_uop.vm;
1552	    assign result.vxrm            = alu_uop.vxrm;
1553	    assign result.vs2_eew         = alu_uop.vs2_eew;
1554	    assign result.w_valid         = 'b0;
1555	    assign result.src2_sgn        = src2_sgn;
1556	    assign result.src1_sgn        = src1_sgn;
1557	    assign result.last_uop_valid  = alu_uop.last_uop_valid;
1558	    assign result.uop_index       = alu_uop.uop_index;
1559	    assign result.w_data          = product8;
1560	    assign result.vsat_cout.cout  = cout8;
1561	    
1562	    always_comb begin
1563	      result.v0_src2.v0 = v0_data;
1564	      result.vd_src1.vd = alu_uop.vd_data;
1565	
1566	      case(uop_funct3) 
1567	        OPIVV,
1568	        OPIVX: begin
1569	          case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
1570	            VMINU,
1571	            VMIN,
1572	            VMAXU,
1573	            VMAX: begin
1574	              result.v0_src2.src2 = src2_data;
1575	              result.vd_src1.src1 = src1_data;
1576	            end
1577	          endcase
1578	        end
1579	      endcase
1580	    end
1581	
1582	endmodule

1	
2	`ifndef HDL_VERILOG_RVV_DESIGN_RVV_SVH
3	`include "rvv_backend.svh"
4	`endif
5	`ifndef RVV_ASSERT__SVH
6	`include "rvv_backend_sva.svh"
7	`endif
8	
9	module rvv_backend_alu_unit_mask
10	(
11	  alu_uop_valid,
12	  alu_uop,
13	  result_valid,
14	  result
15	);
16	//
17	// interface signals
18	//
19	  // ALU RS handshake signals
20	  input   logic           alu_uop_valid;
21	  input   ALU_RS_t        alu_uop;
22	
23	  // ALU send result signals to ROB
24	  output  logic           result_valid;
25	  output  PU2ROB_t        result;
26	
27	//
28	// internal signals
29	//
30	  // ALU_RS_t struct signals
31	  logic   [`ROB_DEPTH_WIDTH-1:0]      rob_entry;
32	  FUNCT6_u                            uop_funct6;
33	  logic   [`FUNCT3_WIDTH-1:0]         uop_funct3;
34	  logic   [`VSTART_WIDTH-1:0]         vstart;
35	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 vstart_elements_tmp;
36	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 vstart_elements;
37	  logic   [`VL_WIDTH-1:0]             vl;       
38	  logic                               vm;
39	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 v0_data;           
40	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 vd_data;           
41	  EEW_e                               vd_eew;
42	  logic   [`REGFILE_INDEX_WIDTH-1:0]  vs1_opcode;              
43	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 vs1_data;           
44	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 vs2_data;	        
45	  EEW_e                               vs2_eew;
46	  logic   [`XLEN-1:0] 	              rs1_data;        
47	  logic   [$clog2(`EMUL_MAX)-1:0]     uop_index;          
48	
49	  // execute 
50	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 src2_data;
51	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 src2_data_sub1;
52	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 src1_data;
53	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 tail_mask;
54	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data;
55	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_andn;
56	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_and; 
57	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_or;  
58	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_xor; 
59	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_orn; 
60	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_nand;
61	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_nor; 
62	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_xnor;
63	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_vmsof;
64	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_vmsif;
65	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_vmsif;
66	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_vmsbf;
67	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_vfirst;
68	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_vid8;
69	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_vid16;
70	  logic   [`VLEN-1:0]                 result_data_vid32;
71	
72	  // for-loop
73	  genvar                              j;
74	  genvar                              h;
75	
76	//
77	// prepare source data to calculate    
78	//
79	  // split ALU_RS_t struct
80	  assign  rob_entry      = alu_uop.rob_entry;
81	  assign  uop_funct6     = alu_uop.uop_funct6;
82	  assign  uop_funct3     = alu_uop.uop_funct3;
83	  assign  vstart         = alu_uop.vstart;
84	  assign  vl             = alu_uop.vl;
85	  assign  vm             = alu_uop.vm;
86	  assign  v0_data        = alu_uop.v0_data;
87	  assign  vd_data        = alu_uop.vd_data;
88	  assign  vd_eew         = alu_uop.vd_eew;
89	  assign  vs1_opcode     = alu_uop.vs1;
90	  assign  vs1_data       = alu_uop.vs1_data;
91	  assign  rs1_data       = alu_uop.vs1_data[`XLEN-1:0];
92	  assign  vs2_data       = alu_uop.vs2_data;
93	  assign  vs2_eew        = alu_uop.vs2_eew;
94	  assign  uop_index      = alu_uop.uop_index;
95	  
96	//  
97	// prepare source data 
98	//
99	  // get tail mask
100	  //assign tail_mask = vl[`VL_WIDTH-1] ? '1 ((`VLEN)'('b1)<<vl[`VL_WIDTH-2:0]) - 1'b1;
101	  generate
102	    for(j=0;j<`VLEN;j++) assign tail_mask[j] = j[`VL_WIDTH-1:0] < vl;
103	  endgenerate
104	
105	  // prepare valid signal
106	  always_comb begin
107	    // initial the data
108	    result_valid = 'b0;
109	
110	    // prepare source data
111	    case(uop_funct3)
112	      OPIVV,
113	      OPIVX,
114	      OPIVI: begin
115	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
116	          VAND,
117	          VOR,
118	          VXOR: begin
119	            result_valid = alu_uop_valid;
120	          end
121	        endcase
122	      end
123	
124	      OPMVV: begin
125	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
126	          VMANDN,
127	          VMAND,
128	          VMOR,
129	          VMXOR,
130	          VMORN,
131	          VMNAND,
132	          VMNOR,
133	          VMXNOR: begin
134	            result_valid = alu_uop_valid;
135	          end
136	          VWRXUNARY0: begin
137	            case(vs1_opcode)
138	              VFIRST: begin
139	                result_valid = alu_uop_valid;
140	              end
141	            endcase
142	          end
143	          VMUNARY0: begin
144	            case(vs1_opcode)
145	              VMSBF,
146	              VMSOF,
147	              VMSIF,
148	              VID: begin
149	                result_valid = alu_uop_valid;
150	              end
151	            endcase
152	          end
153	        endcase
154	      end
155	    endcase
156	  end
157	
158	  // prepare source data
159	  always_comb begin
160	    // initial the data
161	    src2_data       = 'b0;
162	    src1_data       = 'b0;
163	
164	    // prepare source data
165	    case(uop_funct3)
166	      OPIVV: begin
167	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
168	          VAND,
169	          VOR,
170	          VXOR: begin
171	            src2_data = vs2_data;
172	            src1_data = vs1_data;
173	          end
174	        endcase
175	      end
176	      OPIVX,
177	      OPIVI: begin
178	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
179	          VAND,
180	          VOR,
181	          VXOR: begin
182	            src2_data = vs2_data;
183	            for(int i=0;i<`VLEN/`WORD_WIDTH;i++) begin
184	              case(vs2_eew) 
185	                EEW8: begin
186	                  src1_data[i*`WORD_WIDTH +: `WORD_WIDTH] = {(`WORD_WIDTH/`BYTE_WIDTH){rs1_data[0 +: `BYTE_WIDTH]}};
187	                end
188	                EEW16: begin
189	                  src1_data[i*`WORD_WIDTH +: `WORD_WIDTH] = {(`WORD_WIDTH/`HWORD_WIDTH){rs1_data[0 +: `HWORD_WIDTH]}};
190	                end
191	                EEW32: begin
192	                  src1_data[i*`WORD_WIDTH +: `WORD_WIDTH] = rs1_data;
193	                end
194	              endcase
195	            end
196	          end 
197	        endcase
198	      end
199	      OPMVV: begin
200	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
201	          VMANDN,
202	          VMAND,
203	          VMOR,
204	          VMXOR,
205	          VMORN,
206	          VMNAND,
207	          VMNOR,
208	          VMXNOR: begin
209	            src2_data  = vs2_data;
210	            src1_data  = vs1_data;
211	          end
212	          VWRXUNARY0: begin
213	            case(vs1_opcode)
214	              VFIRST: begin
215	                if (vm==1'b1)
216	                  src2_data = vs2_data&tail_mask;
217	                else
218	                  src2_data = vs2_data&tail_mask&v0_data; 
219	              end
220	            endcase
221	          end
222	          VMUNARY0: begin
223	            case(vs1_opcode)
224	              VMSBF,
225	              VMSOF,
226	              VMSIF: begin
227	                if (vm==1'b1)
228	                  src2_data = vs2_data;
229	                else
230	                  src2_data = vs2_data&v0_data; 
231	              end
232	              // no source operand for VID
233	            endcase
234	          end
235	        endcase
236	      end
237	    endcase
238	  end
239	
240	//    
241	// calculate the result
242	//
243	  assign result_data_and   = src2_data & src1_data;  
244	  assign result_data_andn  = src2_data & (~src1_data);  
245	  assign result_data_or    = src2_data | src1_data;  
246	  assign result_data_xor   = src2_data ^ src1_data;  
247	  assign result_data_orn   = src2_data | (~src1_data);  
248	  assign result_data_nand  = ~(src2_data & src1_data);  
249	  assign result_data_nor   = ~(src2_data | src1_data);  
250	  assign result_data_xnor  = ~(src2_data ^ src1_data); 
251	  assign src2_data_sub1    = src2_data - 1'b1;
252	  assign result_data_vmsof = src2_data & (~src2_data_sub1);
253	  assign result_vmsif      = src2_data ^ src2_data_sub1;
254	  assign result_data_vmsif = (src2_data==0) ? {`VLEN{1'b1}} : result_vmsif;  
255	  assign result_data_vmsbf = (src2_data==0) ? {`VLEN{1'b1}} : {1'b0,result_vmsif[`VLEN-1:1]}; 
256	 
257	  // vfirst
258	  always_comb begin
259	    result_data_vfirst = 'b0;
260	    
261	    if (src2_data=='b0) 
262	      result_data_vfirst = {`VLEN{1'b1}};
263	    else begin
264	      for(int i=0;i<`VLEN;i++) begin
265	        if (result_data_vmsof[i]==1'b1)
266	          result_data_vfirst = (`VLEN)'(i);         // one-hot to 8421BCD. get the index of first 1
267	      end
268	    end
269	  end
270	
271	  // vid
272	  generate
273	    for(j=0;j<`VLENB;j++) begin: GET_VID8
274	      assign result_data_vid8[j*`BYTE_WIDTH +: `BYTE_WIDTH] = (`BYTE_WIDTH)'({uop_index, j[$clog2(`VLENB)-1:0]});
275	    end
276	  endgenerate
277	
278	  generate
279	    for(j=0;j<`VLEN/`HWORD_WIDTH;j++) begin: GET_VID16
280	      assign result_data_vid16[j*`HWORD_WIDTH +: `HWORD_WIDTH] = (`HWORD_WIDTH)'({uop_index, j[$clog2(`VLEN/`HWORD_WIDTH)-1:0]});
281	    end
282	  endgenerate
283	
284	  generate
285	    for(j=0;j<`VLEN/`WORD_WIDTH;j++) begin: GET_VID32
286	      assign result_data_vid32[j*`WORD_WIDTH +: `WORD_WIDTH] = (`WORD_WIDTH)'({uop_index, j[$clog2(`VLEN/`WORD_WIDTH)-1:0]});
287	    end
288	  endgenerate
289	
290	  // get result_data
291	  always_comb begin
292	    // initial the data
293	    result_data = 'b0; 
294	 
295	    // calculate result data
296	    case(uop_funct3)
297	      OPIVV,
298	      OPIVX,
299	      OPIVI: begin
300	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
301	          VAND: begin
302	            result_data = result_data_and;
303	          end
304	          VOR: begin
305	            result_data = result_data_or;
306	          end
307	          VXOR: begin
308	            result_data = result_data_xor;
309	          end
310	        endcase
311	      end
312	      OPMVV: begin
313	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
314	          VMANDN: begin
315	            result_data = result_data_andn;
316	          end
317	          VMAND: begin
318	            result_data = result_data_and; 
319	          end
320	          VMOR: begin
321	            result_data = result_data_or; 
322	          end
323	          VMXOR: begin
324	            result_data = result_data_xor; 
325	          end
326	          VMORN: begin
327	            result_data = result_data_orn; 
328	          end
329	          VMNAND: begin
330	            result_data = result_data_nand; 
331	          end
332	          VMNOR: begin
333	            result_data = result_data_nor; 
334	          end
335	          VMXNOR: begin
336	            result_data = result_data_xnor; 
337	          end
338	          VWRXUNARY0: begin
339	            case(vs1_opcode)
340	              VFIRST: begin
341	                result_data = result_data_vfirst;
342	              end
343	            endcase
344	          end
345	          VMUNARY0: begin
346	            case(vs1_opcode)
347	              VMSBF: begin
348	                result_data = result_data_vmsbf;
349	              end
350	              VMSOF: begin
351	                result_data = result_data_vmsof;
352	              end
353	              VMSIF: begin
354	                result_data = result_data_vmsif;
355	              end
356	              VID: begin
357	                case(vd_eew)
358	                  EEW8: begin
359	                    result_data = result_data_vid8;
360	                  end
361	                  EEW16: begin
362	                    result_data = result_data_vid16;
363	                  end
364	                  EEW32: begin
365	                    result_data = result_data_vid32;
366	                  end
367	                endcase
368	              end
369	            endcase
370	          end
371	        endcase
372	      end
373	    endcase
374	  end
375	
376	//
377	// submit result to ROB
378	//
379	  barrel_shifter #(.DATA_WIDTH(`VLEN)) 
380	  u_prestart (.din((`VLEN)'('1)), .shift_amount(vstart[$clog2(`VLEN)-1:0]), .shift_mode(2'b00), .dout(vstart_elements_tmp));
381	  assign vstart_elements  = ~vstart_elements_tmp;
382	
383	  always_comb begin
384	    // initial
385	  `ifdef TB_SUPPORT
386	    result.uop_pc    = alu_uop.uop_pc;
387	  `endif
388	    result.rob_entry = rob_entry;
389	    result.w_data    = result_data;
390	    result.w_valid   = result_valid;
391	    result.vsaturate = 'b0;
392	  `ifdef ZVE32F_ON
393	    result.fpexp     = 'b0;
394	  `endif
395	
396	    case(uop_funct3)
397	      OPIVV,
398	      OPIVX,
399	      OPIVI: begin
400	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
401	          VAND,
402	          VOR,
403	          VXOR: begin
404	            result.w_data = result_data;
405	          end
406	        endcase
407	      end
408	      OPMVV: begin
409	        case(uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
410	          VMANDN,
411	          VMAND,
412	          VMOR,
413	          VMXOR,
414	          VMORN,
415	          VMNAND,
416	          VMNOR,
417	          VMXNOR: begin
418	            result.w_data = result_data&(~vstart_elements) | vd_data&vstart_elements;
419	          end
420	          VWRXUNARY0: begin
421	            case(vs1_opcode)
422	              VFIRST: begin
423	                result.w_data = result_data;
424	              end
425	            endcase
426	          end
427	          VMUNARY0: begin
428	            case(vs1_opcode)
429	              VMSBF,
430	              VMSOF,
431	              VMSIF: begin
432	                if (vm==1'b1)
433	                  result.w_data = result_data;
434	                else 
435	                  result.w_data = result_data&v0_data | vd_data&(~v0_data);
436	              end
437	              VID: begin
438	                result.w_data = result_data;
439	              end
440	            endcase
441	          end
442	        endcase
443	      end
444	    endcase
445	  end   
446	
447	endmodule

8	module rvv_backend_fdiv_unit(
9	  clk,
10	  rst_n,
11	  fdiv_uop_valid,
12	  fdiv_uop,
13	  fdiv_uop_ready,
14	  result_valid,
15	  result,

18	);
19	  // global signals
20	  input   logic     clk;
21	  input   logic     rst_n;
22	
23	  // DIV RS handshake signals
24	  input   logic     fdiv_uop_valid;
25	  input   DIV_RS_t  fdiv_uop;
26	  output  logic     fdiv_uop_ready;
27	
28	  // DIV send result signals to ROB
29	  output  logic     result_valid;
30	  output  PU2ROB_t  result;
31	  input   logic     result_ready;
32	
33	  // trap-flush
34	  input   logic     trap_flush_rvv;
35	
36	//
37	// internal signals
38	//
39	  fpnew_pkg::operation_e              op_type;
40	  logic [`VLEN-1:0]                   src2;
41	  logic [`VLEN-1:0]                   src1;
42	  logic                               fdiv_busy;
43	  logic                               fdiv_busy_c;
44	  logic                               fdiv_valid;
45	  logic [`VLENW-1:0]                  fdiv_ready;
46	  FDIV_RES_t                          uop_info;
47	  FDIV_RES_t                          uop_info_q;
48	  logic [`VLEN-1:0]                   sub_result;
49	  logic [`VLENW-1:0]                  sub_result_vld;
50	  fpnew_pkg::status_t  [`VLENW-1:0]   sub_fpexp;
51	  
52	  // prepare source data
53	  always_comb begin
54	    op_type = fpnew_pkg::DIV;
55	    src2    = 'b0;
56	    src1    = 'b0;
57	
58	    case(fdiv_uop.uop_funct6.ari_funct6)
59	      VFDIV: begin
60	        op_type = fpnew_pkg::DIV;
61	        src2    = fdiv_uop.vs2_data;
62	
63	        if(fdiv_uop.uop_funct3==OPFVV) 
64	          src1  = fdiv_uop.vs1_data;
65	        else 
66	          src1  = {`VLENW{fdiv_uop.vs1_data[`WORD_WIDTH-1:0]}};
67	      end
68	      VFRDIV: begin
69	        op_type = fpnew_pkg::DIV;
70	        src2    = {`VLENW{fdiv_uop.vs1_data[`WORD_WIDTH-1:0]}};
71	        src1    = fdiv_uop.vs2_data;
72	      end
73	      VFUNARY1: begin
74	        op_type = fpnew_pkg::SQRT;
75	        src2    = fdiv_uop.vs2_data;
76	      end
77	    endcase
78	  end
79	  
80	  // FDIV is busy
81	  assign fdiv_busy_c = result_valid && result_ready || trap_flush_rvv;
82	  assign fdiv_valid  = !fdiv_busy && fdiv_uop_valid && (&fdiv_ready);
83	  // ready to receive
84	  assign fdiv_uop_ready = fdiv_valid;
85	
86	  cdffr busy(.q(fdiv_busy), .clk(clk), .rst_n(rst_n), .c(fdiv_busy_c), .e(fdiv_valid), .d(1'b1));
87	
88	  // register information 
89	`ifdef TB_SUPPORT
90	  assign uop_info.uop_pc    = fdiv_uop.uop_pc;
91	`endif
92	  assign uop_info.rob_entry = fdiv_uop.rob_entry;
93	
94	  edff #(
95	    .T      (FDIV_RES_t)
96	  ) uop_information
97	  (
98	    .clk    (clk),
99	    .rst_n  (rst_n),
100	    .e      (fdiv_uop_valid&fdiv_uop_ready),
101	    .d      (uop_info),
102	    .q      (uop_info_q)
103	  );
104	
105	  for(genvar i=0;i<`VLENW;i++) begin:fdiv
106	    fpnew_divsqrt_th_64_multi #(
107	      .FpFmtConfig        (5'b10000),
108	      .NumPipeRegs        (1),
109	      .PipeConfig         (fpnew_pkg::BEFORE)
110	    )
111	    fdiv(
112	      .clk_i              (clk),
113	      .rst_ni             (rst_n),
114	      // Input signals
115	      .operands_i         ({src1[i*`WORD_WIDTH+:`WORD_WIDTH], src2[i*`WORD_WIDTH+:`WORD_WIDTH]}), // 2 operands
116	      .is_boxed_i         ('1), // 2 operands
117	      .rnd_mode_i         (fpnew_pkg::roundmode_e'(fdiv_uop.frm)),
118	      .op_i               (op_type),
119	      .dst_fmt_i          (fpnew_pkg::FP32),
120	      .tag_i              ('0),
121	      .mask_i             ('0),
122	      .aux_i              ('0),
123	      .vectorial_op_i     ('0),
124	      // Input Handshake
125	      .in_valid_i         (fdiv_valid),
126	      .in_ready_o         (fdiv_ready[i]),
127	      .divsqrt_done_o     (),
128	      .simd_synch_done_i  ('0),
129	      .divsqrt_ready_o    (),
130	      .simd_synch_rdy_i   ('0),
131	      .flush_i            (trap_flush_rvv),
132	      // Output signals
133	      .result_o           (sub_result[i*`WORD_WIDTH +: `WORD_WIDTH]),
134	      .status_o           (sub_fpexp[i]),
135	      .extension_bit_o    (),
136	      .tag_o              (),
137	      .mask_o             (),
138	      .aux_o              (),
139	      // Output handshake 
140	      .out_valid_o        (sub_result_vld[i]),
141	      .out_ready_i        (result_valid&result_ready),
142	      // Indication of valid data in flight
143	      .busy_o             (),
144	      // External register enable override
145	      .reg_ena_i          ('0),
146	      // Early valid for external structural hazard generation
147	      .early_out_valid_o  ()
148	    );
149	
150	  // submit result to ROB
151	    assign result.fpexp[i*4+:4] = {4{sub_fpexp[i]}};
152	  end
153	    
154	  assign result_valid     = &sub_result_vld;
155	`ifdef TB_SUPPORT
156	  assign result.uop_pc    = uop_info_q.uop_pc;
157	`endif
158	  assign result.rob_entry = uop_info_q.rob_entry;
159	  assign result.w_data    = sub_result;
160	  assign result.w_valid   = 'b1;
161	  assign result.vsaturate = 'b0;
162	
163	endmodule

`endif

// VRF REG depth
`define NUM_VRF                 32

// Uops Queue data width
`define UQ_WIDTH                $bits(UOP_QUEUE_t)

// the max number of processor unit in EX stage
`define NUM_LSU                 2
`define NUM_ALU                 2
`define NUM_MUL                 2
`define NUM_PMTRDT              1
`define NUM_DIV                 1

`ifdef ZVE32F_ON
  `define NUM_FMA               2
  `define NUM_FRDT              1
  `define NUM_FDIV              1
  `define NUM_FSUB              4
  `define NUM_ARI               (`NUM_ALU+`NUM_PMTRDT+`NUM_MUL+`NUM_DIV+`NUM_FMA)
  `define NUM_PU                (`NUM_ARI+`NUM_LSU)
`else
  // Define FP variables even if not used
  // TODO(derekjchow): Remove FP modules from chisel build once float is
  // configurable.
  `define NUM_FMA               0

  `define NUM_ARI               (`NUM_ALU+`NUM_PMTRDT+`NUM_MUL+`NUM_DIV)
  `define NUM_PU                (`NUM_ARI+`NUM_LSU)
`endif

`ifdef ARBITER_ON
`define NUM_SMPORT              4
`else
`define NUM_SMPORT              (`NUM_PU)
`endif

`define ROB_DEPTH_WIDTH         $clog2(`ROB_DEPTH)
`define NUM_RT_UOP              4
`define PC_WIDTH                32
`define XLEN                    32
`define FLEN                    32
`define BYTE_WIDTH              8
`define HWORD_WIDTH             16
`define WORD_WIDTH              32
`define EMUL_MAX                8

`ifdef ZVE32F_ON
  `define LAST_UOP_VLD        1
  `ifdef TB_SUPPORT
    `define FP_RDT_TAG_WIDTH  (`LAST_UOP_VLD+`PC_WIDTH+`ROB_DEPTH_WIDTH)
  `else
    `define FP_RDT_TAG_WIDTH  (`LAST_UOP_VLD+`ROB_DEPTH_WIDTH)
  `endif
`else
  // Define FP variables even if not used
  // TODO(derekjchow): Remove FP modules from chisel build once float is
  // configurable.
  `define FP_RDT_TAG_WIDTH    0
`endif

// ALU instruction will be split 8 uops at most
`define UOP_NUM_ALU             8
`define UOP_INDEX_WIDTH_ALU     $clog2(`UOP_NUM_ALU)

// LSU instruction will be split to EMUL_max=32 uops at most
`define UOP_NUM_LSU             32
`define UOP_INDEX_WIDTH_LSU     $clog2(`UOP_NUM_LSU)

// max(`UOP_INDEX_WIDTH_ALU,`UOP_INDEX_WIDTH_LSU)
`define UOP_INDEX_WIDTH         5

// Vector 
`ifdef VLEN_128
`define VLEN                    128
`endif
`ifdef VLEN_256
`define VLEN                    256
`endif

937	      .uop                          (uop_rs2falu),
938	      // FMA to ROB
939	      .result_valid                 (res_valid_falu),
940	      .result                       (res_falu),
941	      .result_ready                 (res_ready_falu),
942	      // trap-flush
943	      .trap_flush_rvv               (trap_flush_rvv)
944	    );
945	   `endif
946	
947	    // LSU remap
948	    assign mapinfo_valid = ~mapinfo_almost_empty;
949	    assign lsu_res_valid = ~lsu_res_almost_empty;
950	    rvv_backend_lsu_remap
951	    u_lsu_remap
952	    (
953	      .mapinfo_valid                (mapinfo_valid),
954	      .mapinfo                      (mapinfo),
955	      .pop_mapinfo                  (pop_mapinfo),
956	      .lsu_res_valid                (lsu_res_valid),
957	      .lsu_res                      (lsu_res),
958	      .pop_lsu_res                  (pop_lsu_res),
959	      .result_valid                 (res_valid_lsu),
960	      .result                       (res_lsu),      
961	      .result_ready                 (res_ready_lsu),
962	      .trap_valid_rmp2rob           (trap_valid_rmp2rob),
963	      .trap_rob_entry_rmp2rob       (trap_rob_entry_rmp2rob),
964	      .trap_ready_rob2rmp           (trap_ready_rob2rmp)  
965	    );
966	
967	    assign res_valid_pu2arb = {
968	                              `ifdef ZVE32F_ON
969	                               res_valid_falu,
970	                              `endif
971	                               res_valid_div,
972	                               res_valid_pmtrdt,  
973	                               res_valid_mul,
974	                               res_valid_alu,

aiTitle: RVV 向量算术执行单元讲义生成

content.content:

14	
15	package coralnpu.rvv
16	
17	import chisel3._
18	import chisel3.util._
19	import coralnpu.{Parameters,RegfileReadDataIO,RegfileWriteDataIO}
20	
21	object RvvCore {
22	  def apply(p: Parameters): RvvCoreShim = {
23	    return Module(new RvvCoreShim(p))
24	  }
25	}
26	
27	object GenerateCoreShimSource {
28	  def apply(instructionLanes: Integer, vlen: Integer): String = {
29	    var moduleInterface = """module RvvCoreWrapper(
30	        |    input clk,
31	        |    input rstn,
32	        |    input logic [VSTART_LEN:0] vstart,
33	        |    input logic [1:0] vxrm,
34	        |    input logic vxsat,
35	        |    input logic [2:0] frm,
36	        |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("VSTART_LEN", (log2Ceil(vlen) - 1).toString)
37	
38	    // Add instruction interface inputs
39	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
40	        moduleInterface += """    input inst_GENI_valid,
41	            |    input [31:0] inst_GENI_bits_pc,
42	            |    input [1:0] inst_GENI_bits_opcode,
43	            |    input [24:0] inst_GENI_bits_bits,
44	            |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
45	    }
46	
47	    // Add regfile read interface inputs
48	    for (i <- 0 until 2*instructionLanes) {
49	        moduleInterface += """    input rs_GENI_valid,
50	            |    input [31:0] rs_GENI_data,
51	            |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
52	    }
53	
54	    // Add float regfile read interface inputs
55	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
56	        moduleInterface += """    input [31:0] frs_GENI,
57	            |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
58	    }
59	
60	    // Add instruction interface outputs (backpressure)
61	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
62	        moduleInterface += "    output inst_GENI_ready,\n".replaceAll(
63	            "GENI", i.toString)
64	    }
65	
66	    // Add regfile write interface outputs
67	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
68	        moduleInterface += """    output rd_GENI_valid,
69	            |    output [4:0] rd_GENI_bits_addr,
70	            |    output [31:0] rd_GENI_bits_data,
71	            |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
72	    }
73	
74	    moduleInterface += """    output async_rd_valid,
75	        |    output [4:0] async_rd_bits_addr,
76	        |    output [31:0] async_rd_bits_data,
77	        |    input async_rd_ready,
78	        |    output async_frd_valid,
79	        |    output [4:0] async_frd_bits_addr,
80	        |    output [31:0] async_frd_bits_data,
81	        |    input async_frd_ready,
82	        |""".stripMargin
83	
84	    // RVV to LSU
85	    for (i <- 0 until 2) {
86	        moduleInterface += """    output rvv2lsu_GENI_valid,
87	            |    output rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_idx_valid,
88	            |    output [4:0] rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_idx_bits_addr,
89	            |    output [VLEN-1:0] rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_idx_bits_data,
90	            |    output rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_vregfile_valid,
91	            |    output [4:0] rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_vregfile_bits_addr,
92	            |    output [VLEN-1:0] rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_vregfile_bits_data,
93	            |    output rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_mask_valid,
94	            |    output [(VLEN/8)-1:0] rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_mask_bits,
95	            |    input rvv2lsu_GENI_ready,
96	            |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString).replaceAll(
97	                "VLEN", vlen.toString)
98	    }
99	
100	    // LSU to RVV
101	    for (i <- 0 until 2) {
102	        moduleInterface += """    input lsu2rvv_GENI_valid,
103	            |    input [4:0] lsu2rvv_GENI_bits_addr,
104	            |    input [VLEN-1:0] lsu2rvv_GENI_bits_data,
105	            |    input  lsu2rvv_GENI_bits_last,
106	            |    output lsu2rvv_GENI_ready,
107	            |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString).replaceAll(
108	                "VLEN", vlen.toString)
109	    }
110	
111	    // Add CSR output
112	    moduleInterface += """    output vcsr_valid,
113	        |    output [VSTART_LEN:0] vcsr_vstart,
114	        |    output [1:0] vcsr_xrm,
115	        |    output vcsr_vxsat,
116	        |    input vcsr_ready,
117	        |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("VSTART_LEN", (log2Ceil(vlen) - 1).toString)
118	
119	    // Add RVV Config state output
120	    moduleInterface += """    output configStateValid,
121	        |    output [7:0] configVl,
122	        |    output [VSTART_LEN:0] configVstart,
123	        |    output configMa,
124	        |    output configTa,
125	        |    output [1:0] configXrm,
126	        |    output [2:0] configSew,
127	        |    output [2:0] configLmul,
128	        |    output [2:0] configLmulOrig,
129	        |    output configVill,
130	        |    output logic rvv_idle,
131	        |    output logic [3:0] queue_capacity,
132	        |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("VSTART_LEN", (log2Ceil(vlen) - 1).toString)
133	
134	    // Add rd_rob2rt_o interface outputs
135	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
136	        moduleInterface += """
137	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_valid,
138	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_w_valid,
139	            |    output [4:0] rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_w_index,
140	            |    output [127:0] rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_w_data,
141	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_w_type,
142	            |    output [15:0] rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vd_type,
143	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_trap_flag,
144	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_vl,
145	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_vstart,
146	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_ma,
147	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_ta,
148	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_xrm,
149	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_sew,
150	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_lmul,
151	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_lmul_orig,
152	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_vill,
153	            |    output [15:0] rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vxsaturate,
154	            |    output [31:0] rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_uop_pc,
155	            |    output rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_last_uop_valid,
156	            """.stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
157	    }
158	
159	    // Add trap interface outputs
160	    moduleInterface += """
161	        |    output trap_valid,
162	        |    output [31:0] trap_bits_pc,
163	        |    output [1:0] trap_bits_opcode,
164	        |    output [24:0] trap_bits_bits,""".stripMargin
165	
166	    // Add vxsat backend update outputs
167	    moduleInterface += """
168	        |    output wr_vxsat_valid_o,
169	        |    output wr_vxsat_o,""".stripMargin
170	
171	    // Remove last comma/linebreak
172	    moduleInterface = moduleInterface.dropRight(1)
173	    moduleInterface += "\n);\n"
174	
175	    var coreInstantiation = "  logic [GENN-1:0] inst_valid;\n".replaceAll(
176	            "GENN", instructionLanes.toString)
177	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
178	      coreInstantiation += "  assign inst_valid[GENI] = inst_GENI_valid;\n".replaceAll(
179	          "GENI", i.toString)
180	    }
181	
182	    // Inst data
183	    coreInstantiation += "  RVVInstruction [GENN-1:0] inst_data;\n".replaceAll(
184	            "GENN", instructionLanes.toString)
185	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
186	      coreInstantiation += "  assign inst_data[GENI].pc = inst_GENI_bits_pc;\n".replaceAll(
187	          "GENI", i.toString)
188	      coreInstantiation += "  assign inst_data[GENI].opcode = RVVOpCode'(inst_GENI_bits_opcode);\n".replaceAll(
189	          "GENI", i.toString)
190	      coreInstantiation += "  assign inst_data[GENI].bits = inst_GENI_bits_bits;\n".replaceAll(
191	          "GENI", i.toString)
192	    }
193	
194	    // Inst ready temp output
195	    coreInstantiation += "  logic [GENN-1:0] inst_ready;\n".replaceAll(
196	        "GENN", instructionLanes.toString)
197	
198	    // Scalar regfile read
199	    coreInstantiation += "  logic [2*GENN-1:0] reg_read_valid;\n".replaceAll(
200	            "GENN", instructionLanes.toString)
201	    for (i <- 0 until 2*instructionLanes) {
202	      coreInstantiation += "  assign reg_read_valid[GENI] = rs_GENI_valid;\n".replaceAll(
203	          "GENI", i.toString)
204	    }
205	    coreInstantiation += "  logic [2*GENN-1:0][31:0] reg_read_data;\n".replaceAll(
206	            "GENN", instructionLanes.toString)
207	    for (i <- 0 until 2*instructionLanes) {
208	      coreInstantiation += "  assign reg_read_data[GENI] = rs_GENI_data;\n".replaceAll(
209	          "GENI", i.toString)
210	    }
211	
212	    // Float regfile read
213	    coreInstantiation += "  logic [GENN-1:0][31:0] freg_read_data;\n".replaceAll(
214	            "GENN", instructionLanes.toString)
215	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
216	      coreInstantiation += "  assign freg_read_data[GENI] = frs_GENI;\n".replaceAll(
217	          "GENI", i.toString)
218	    }
219	
220	    // RVV2LSU
221	    coreInstantiation += """  logic [2-1:0] uop_lsu_valid_rvv2lsu;
222	      |  logic [2-1:0] uop_lsu_idx_valid_rvv2lsu;
223	      |  logic [2-1:0][4:0] uop_lsu_idx_addr_rvv2lsu;
224	      |  logic [2-1:0][VLEN-1:0] uop_lsu_idx_data_rvv2lsu;
225	      |  logic [2-1:0] uop_lsu_vregfile_valid_rvv2lsu;
226	      |  logic [2-1:0][4:0] uop_lsu_vregfile_addr_rvv2lsu;
227	      |  logic [2-1:0][VLEN-1:0] uop_lsu_vregfile_data_rvv2lsu;
228	      |  logic [2-1:0] uop_lsu_v0_valid_rvv2lsu;
229	      |  logic [2-1:0][(VLEN/8)-1:0] uop_lsu_v0_data_rvv2lsu;
230	      |  logic [2-1:0] uop_lsu_ready_lsu2rvv;""".stripMargin.replaceAll(
231	          "VLEN", vlen.toString)
232	    for (i <- 0 until 2) {
233	      coreInstantiation += """
234	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_valid = uop_lsu_valid_rvv2lsu[GENI];
235	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_idx_valid = uop_lsu_idx_valid_rvv2lsu[GENI];
236	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_idx_bits_addr = uop_lsu_idx_addr_rvv2lsu[GENI];
237	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_idx_bits_data = uop_lsu_idx_data_rvv2lsu[GENI];
238	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_vregfile_valid = uop_lsu_vregfile_valid_rvv2lsu[GENI];
239	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_vregfile_bits_addr = uop_lsu_vregfile_addr_rvv2lsu[GENI];
240	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_vregfile_bits_data = uop_lsu_vregfile_data_rvv2lsu[GENI];
241	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_mask_valid = uop_lsu_v0_valid_rvv2lsu[GENI];
242	          |  assign rvv2lsu_GENI_bits_mask_bits = uop_lsu_v0_data_rvv2lsu[GENI];
243	          |  assign uop_lsu_ready_lsu2rvv[GENI] = rvv2lsu_GENI_ready;
244	          |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
245	    }
246	
247	
248	    // LSU2RVV
249	    coreInstantiation += """  logic [2-1:0] uop_lsu_valid_lsu2rvv;
250	      |  logic  [2-1:0][4:0]  uop_lsu_addr_lsu2rvv;
251	      |  logic  [2-1:0][VLEN-1:0] uop_lsu_wdata_lsu2rvv;
252	      |  logic  [2-1:0] uop_lsu_last_lsu2rvv;
253	      |  logic  [2-1:0] uop_lsu_ready_rvv2lsu;""".stripMargin.replaceAll(
254	          "VLEN", vlen.toString)
255	    for (i <- 0 until 2) {
256	      coreInstantiation += """
257	          |  assign uop_lsu_valid_lsu2rvv[GENI] = lsu2rvv_GENI_valid;
258	          |  assign uop_lsu_addr_lsu2rvv[GENI] = lsu2rvv_GENI_bits_addr;
259	          |  assign uop_lsu_wdata_lsu2rvv[GENI] = lsu2rvv_GENI_bits_data;
260	          |  assign uop_lsu_last_lsu2rvv[GENI] = lsu2rvv_GENI_bits_last;
261	          |  assign lsu2rvv_GENI_ready = uop_lsu_ready_rvv2lsu[GENI];
262	          |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
263	    }
264	
265	    // Scalar regfile write temp output
266	    coreInstantiation += """  logic [GENN-1:0] reg_write_valid;
267	        |  logic [GENN-1:0][4:0] reg_write_addr;
268	        |  logic [GENN-1:0][31:0] reg_write_data;
269	        |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENN", instructionLanes.toString)
270	
271	    // VCSR temp output
272	    coreInstantiation += """  RVVConfigState vector_csr;
273	        |  assign vcsr_vstart = vector_csr.vstart;
274	        |  assign vcsr_xrm = vector_csr.xrm;
275	        |  assign vcsr_vxsat = vector_csr.xsat;
276	        |""".stripMargin
277	    // RVV Config State temp output
278	    coreInstantiation += """  RVVConfigState config_state;
279	        |""".stripMargin
280	
281	    coreInstantiation += "  ROB2RT_t [3:0] rd_rob2rt_o;\n"
282	    coreInstantiation += "  logic [3:0] rd_valid_rob2rt_o;\n"
283	    coreInstantiation += "  RVVInstruction trap_data;\n"
284	
285	    coreInstantiation += """  RvvCore#(.N (GENN)) core(
286	        |      .clk(clk),
287	        |      .rstn(rstn),
288	        |      .vstart(vstart),
289	        |      .vxrm(vxrm),
290	        |      .vxsat(vxsat),
291	        |      .frm(frm),
292	        |      .inst_valid(inst_valid),
293	        |      .inst_data(inst_data),
294	        |      .inst_ready(inst_ready),
295	        |      .reg_read_valid(reg_read_valid),
296	        |      .reg_read_data(reg_read_data),
297	        |      .freg_read_data(freg_read_data),
298	        |      .reg_write_valid(reg_write_valid),
299	        |      .reg_write_addr(reg_write_addr),
300	        |      .reg_write_data(reg_write_data),
301	        |      .async_rd_valid(async_rd_valid),
302	        |      .async_rd_addr(async_rd_bits_addr),
303	        |      .async_rd_data(async_rd_bits_data),
304	        |      .async_rd_ready(async_rd_ready),
305	        |      .async_frd_valid(async_frd_valid),
306	        |      .async_frd_addr(async_frd_bits_addr),
307	        |      .async_frd_data(async_frd_bits_data),
308	        |      .async_frd_ready(async_frd_ready),
309	        |      .uop_lsu_valid_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_valid_rvv2lsu),
310	        |      .uop_lsu_idx_valid_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_idx_valid_rvv2lsu),
311	        |      .uop_lsu_idx_addr_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_idx_addr_rvv2lsu),
312	        |      .uop_lsu_idx_data_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_idx_data_rvv2lsu),
313	        |      .uop_lsu_vregfile_valid_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_vregfile_valid_rvv2lsu),
314	        |      .uop_lsu_vregfile_addr_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_vregfile_addr_rvv2lsu),
315	        |      .uop_lsu_vregfile_data_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_vregfile_data_rvv2lsu),
316	        |      .uop_lsu_v0_valid_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_v0_valid_rvv2lsu),
317	        |      .uop_lsu_v0_data_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_v0_data_rvv2lsu),
318	        |      .uop_lsu_ready_lsu2rvv(uop_lsu_ready_lsu2rvv),
319	        |      .uop_lsu_valid_lsu2rvv(uop_lsu_valid_lsu2rvv),
320	        |      .uop_lsu_addr_lsu2rvv(uop_lsu_addr_lsu2rvv),
321	        |      .uop_lsu_wdata_lsu2rvv(uop_lsu_wdata_lsu2rvv),
322	        |      .uop_lsu_last_lsu2rvv(uop_lsu_last_lsu2rvv),
323	        |      .uop_lsu_ready_rvv2lsu(uop_lsu_ready_rvv2lsu),
324	        |      .vcsr_valid(vcsr_valid),
325	        |      .vector_csr(vector_csr),
326	        |      .vcsr_ready(vcsr_ready),
327	        |      .config_state_valid(configStateValid),
328	        |      .config_state(config_state),
329	        |      .rvv_idle(rvv_idle),
330	        |      .queue_capacity(queue_capacity),
331	        |      .rd_valid_rob2rt_o(rd_valid_rob2rt_o),
332	        |      .rd_rob2rt_o(rd_rob2rt_o),
333	        |      .trap_valid_o(trap_valid),
334	        |      .trap_data_o(trap_data),
335	        |      .wr_vxsat_valid_o(wr_vxsat_valid_o),
336	        |      .wr_vxsat_o(wr_vxsat_o)
337	        |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENN", instructionLanes.toString)
338	    coreInstantiation += "  );\n"
339	
340	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
341	      coreInstantiation += """  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_valid = rd_valid_rob2rt_o[GENI];
342	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_w_valid = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].w_valid;
343	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_w_index = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].w_index;
344	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_w_data = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].w_data;
345	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_w_type = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].w_type;
346	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vd_type = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vd_type;
347	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_trap_flag = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].trap_flag;
348	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_vl = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.vl;
349	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_vstart = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.vstart;
350	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_ma = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.ma;
351	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_ta = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.ta;
352	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_xrm = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.xrm;
353	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_sew = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.sew;
354	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_lmul = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.lmul;
355	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_lmul_orig = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.lmul_orig;
356	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vector_csr_vill = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vector_csr.vill;
357	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_vxsaturate = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].vxsaturate;
358	      |`ifdef TB_SUPPORT
359	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_uop_pc = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].uop_pc;
360	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_last_uop_valid = rd_rob2rt_o[GENI].last_uop_valid;
361	      |`else
362	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_uop_pc = 32'b0;
363	      |  assign rd_rob2rt_o_GENI_last_uop_valid = 1'b0;
364	      |`endif
365	      |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
366	    }
367	    coreInstantiation += """  assign trap_bits_pc = trap_data.pc;
368	      |  assign trap_bits_opcode = trap_data.opcode;
369	      |  assign trap_bits_bits = trap_data.bits;
370	      |""".stripMargin
371	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
372	      coreInstantiation += "  assign inst_GENI_ready = inst_ready[GENI];\n".replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
373	    }
374	    for (i <- 0 until instructionLanes) {
375	      coreInstantiation += """  assign rd_GENI_valid = reg_write_valid[GENI];
376	      |  assign rd_GENI_bits_addr = reg_write_addr[GENI];
377	      |  assign rd_GENI_bits_data = reg_write_data[GENI];
378	      |""".stripMargin.replaceAll("GENI", i.toString)
379	    }
380	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configVl = config_state.vl;\n"
381	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configVstart = config_state.vstart;\n"
382	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configMa = config_state.ma;\n"
383	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configTa = config_state.ta;\n"
384	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configXrm = config_state.xrm;\n"
385	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configSew = config_state.sew;\n"
386	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configLmul = config_state.lmul;\n"
387	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configLmulOrig = config_state.lmul_orig;\n"
388	    coreInstantiation += "  assign configVill = config_state.vill;\n"
389	
390	    moduleInterface + coreInstantiation + "endmodule\n"
391	  }
392	}

394	object GenerateBackendConfig {
395	  def apply(p: Parameters): String = {
396	    var config = """`ifndef RVV_CONFIG_SVH
397	        |`define RVV_CONFIG_SVH
398	        |
399	        |// config for multi-dispatch
400	        |`define DISPATCH3
401	        |//`define DISPATCH2
402	        |
403	        |// FP ISA
404	        |//`define ZVE32F_ON
405	        |""".stripMargin
406	    if (p.enableVectorBf16) {
407	      config += "`define ZVFBFWMA_ON\n"
408	    } else {
409	      config += "//`define ZVFBFWMA_ON\n"
410	    }
411	    config += """
412	        |// LSU interaction
413	        |// Disable until scalar side supports NOHANDSHAKE
414	        |// `define UNMK_USCS_LOAD_NOHANDSHAKE
415	        |
416	        |// ARBITER
417	        |`define ARBITER_ON
418	        |
419	        |`endif // RVV_CONFIG_SVH
420	        |""".stripMargin
421	    config
422	  }
423	}

427	class RvvCoreWrapper(p: Parameters) extends BlackBox with HasBlackBoxInline
428	                                                     with HasBlackBoxResource {
429	  val io = IO(new Bundle {
430	    val clk  = Input(Clock())
431	    val rstn = Input(AsyncReset())
432	
433	    val vstart = Input(UInt(log2Ceil(p.rvvVlen).W))
434	    val vxrm = Input(UInt(2.W))
435	    val vxsat = Input(UInt(1.W))
436	    val frm = Input(UInt(3.W))
437	
438	    val inst = Vec(p.instructionLanes,
439	        Flipped(Decoupled(new RvvCompressedInstruction(p))))
440	
441	    val rs = Vec(p.instructionLanes * 2, Flipped(new RegfileReadDataIO(p)))
442	    val rd = Vec(p.instructionLanes, Valid(new RegfileWriteDataIO(p)))
443	    val frs = Vec(p.instructionLanes, Input(UInt(32.W)))
444	
445	    val async_rd = Decoupled(new RegfileWriteDataIO(p))
446	    val async_frd = Decoupled(new RegfileWriteDataIO(p))
447	
448	    val rd_rob2rt_o = Vec(4, new Rob2Rt(p))
449	    val trap = Output(Valid(new RvvCompressedInstruction(p)))
450	
451	    val vcsr_valid = Output(Bool())
452	    val vcsr_vstart = Output(UInt(7.W))
453	    val vcsr_xrm = Output(UInt(2.W))

615	// Shim class for RVVCore, which translates the SV RVVCore interfaces with the
616	// Chisel ones. Note, we name this class "RvvCoreShim" to avoid conflict with
617	// the "RvvCore" defined in SystemVerilog
618	class RvvCoreShim(p: Parameters) extends Module {
619	  val io = IO(new RvvCoreIO(p))
620	
621	  val vstart = RegInit(0.U(log2Ceil(p.rvvVlen).W))
622	  val vxrm = RegInit(0.U(2.W))
623	  val vxsat = RegInit(false.B)
624	
625	  val rstn = (!reset.asBool).asAsyncReset
626	  val rvvCoreWrapper = Module(new RvvCoreWrapper(p))
627	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.clk := clock
628	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.rstn := rstn
629	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.inst <> io.inst
630	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.rs <> io.rs
631	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.rd <> io.rd
632	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.frs <> io.frs
633	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.async_rd <> io.async_rd
634	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.async_frd <> io.async_frd
635	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.rd_rob2rt_o <> io.rd_rob2rt_o
636	  io.trap := rvvCoreWrapper.io.trap
637	
638	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.vstart := Mux(
639	      io.csr.vstart_write.valid, io.csr.vstart_write.bits, vstart)
640	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.vxrm := Mux(
641	      io.csr.vxrm_write.valid, io.csr.vxrm_write.bits, vxrm)
642	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.vxsat := Mux(
643	      io.csr.vxsat_write.valid, io.csr.vxsat_write.bits, vxsat)
644	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.frm := io.csr.frm
645	  rvvCoreWrapper.io.vcsr_ready := true.B
646	
647	  io.rvv2lsu <> rvvCoreWrapper.io.rvv2lsu
648	  io.lsu2rvv <> rvvCoreWrapper.io.lsu2rvv
649	
650	  // Conservatively mark config state as invalid the cycle when CSR instruction
651	  // updates vstart, vxrm or vxsat.
652	  io.configState.valid := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configStateValid &&
653	      !rvvCoreWrapper.io.vcsr_valid &&
654	      !io.csr.vstart_write.valid &&
655	      !io.csr.vxrm_write.valid &&
656	      !io.csr.vxsat_write.valid
657	  io.configState.bits.vl          := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configVl
658	  io.configState.bits.vstart      := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configVstart
659	  io.configState.bits.ma          := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configMa
660	  io.configState.bits.ta          := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configTa
661	  io.configState.bits.xrm         := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configXrm
662	  io.configState.bits.sew         := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configSew
663	  io.configState.bits.lmul        := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configLmul
664	  io.configState.bits.lmul_orig   := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configLmulOrig
665	  io.configState.bits.vill        := rvvCoreWrapper.io.configVill
666	  io.rvv_idle                     := rvvCoreWrapper.io.rvv_idle
667	  io.queue_capacity               := rvvCoreWrapper.io.queue_capacity
668	
669	  val vstart_wdata = MuxCase(vstart, Seq(
670	      rvvCoreWrapper.io.vcsr_valid -> rvvCoreWrapper.io.vcsr_vstart,
671	      io.csr.vstart_write.valid -> io.csr.vstart_write.bits,
672	  ))
673	  vstart := vstart_wdata
674	
675	  val vxrm_wdata = MuxCase(vxrm, Seq(
676	      rvvCoreWrapper.io.vcsr_valid -> rvvCoreWrapper.io.vcsr_xrm,
677	      io.csr.vxrm_write.valid -> io.csr.vxrm_write.bits,
678	  ))
679	  vxrm := vxrm_wdata
680	
681	  val vxsat_wdata = MuxCase(vxsat, Seq(
682	      rvvCoreWrapper.io.wr_vxsat_valid_o -> (vxsat | rvvCoreWrapper.io.wr_vxsat_o),
683	      rvvCoreWrapper.io.vcsr_valid -> rvvCoreWrapper.io.vcsr_vxsat,
684	      io.csr.vxsat_write.valid -> io.csr.vxsat_write.bits,
685	  ))
686	  vxsat := vxsat_wdata
687	
688	  io.csr.vstart := vstart
689	  io.csr.vxrm := vxrm
690	  io.csr.vxsat := vxsat
691	}

I now have a comprehensive understanding. Key findings:

1. **RvvAlu.scala** (Chisel side) is NOT an execution unit — it's just an `RvvAluOp` ChiselEnum listing RVV ALU opcode names, plus `RvvS1DecodedInstruction` bundle with `op/is_float/is_widening`. It's a type/enum definition for the S1 decode stage, used by the Chisel front-end to represent a decoded instruction. It does NOT implement actual arithmetic. This is the critical insight for the "boundary division" — the Chisel side only enumerates opcode categories; the real arithmetic lives entirely in SystemVerilog.

2. The actual execution is in SystemVerilog:
   - `rvv_backend_alu` — top wrapper, `NUM_ALU=2` units, with a `result_ready`-driven case for routing 1 or 2 uops. Unit 0 has `CMP_SUPPORT=1`.
   - `rvv_backend_alu_unit` — instantiates 4 parallel sub-units: addsub, shift, mask, other; plus an execution_p1 finalize stage. Pipeline (P0 comb → P1 reg).
   - `rvv_backend_alu_unit_addsub` — add/sub/saturating/min-max/widen/carry; produces raw sum/diff per byte.
   - `rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift` — shift (SLL/SRL/SRA), rounding shifts (VSSRL/VSSRA), narrowing (VNSRL/VNSRA), clip (VNCLIP/VNCLIPU) with vxrm rounding and saturation.
   - `rvv_backend_alu_unit_mask` — logical AND/OR/XOR, mask reduction (VMAND/VMOR...), mask register ops (VMSBF/VMSOF/VMSIF), VID, VFIRST.
   - `rvv_backend_alu_unit_other` — VMERGE/VMV, sign/zero extend, VMV_X_S, VSMUL.
   - `rvv_backend_alu_unit_execution_p1` — second pipeline stage: finalizes comparison results (cmp), saturation, min/max selection.

3. `rvv_backend_div` — top divider, `NUM_DIV=1`. Routes `is_div` (integer) to `rvv_backend_div_unit` and (if ZVE32F_ON) non-div (float) to `rvv_backend_fdiv_unit`. Arbiter picks result for ROB.
   - `rvv_backend_div_unit` — integer vector divide. Splits VLEN into 8/16/32-bit lanes, instantiates many `intdivider` (rvv_backend_div_unit_divider). Variable latency.
   - `rvv_backend_div_unit_divider` — `intdivider` wrapper. FSM: IDLE/WORKING/PRINT. Restoring division with leading-zero skip (count_shift). Handles div-by-zero, signed overflow, sign correction. Result caching (res_reuse).
   - `rvv_backend_fdiv_unit` — float divide/sqrt, uses fpnew `fpnew_divsqrt_th_64_multi`, variable latency, per-lane.

4. `rvv_backend_falu` — float ALU, `NUM_FMA=2`. Decodes float uop type (addmul/cmp/cvt/tbl), routes to `rvv_backend_falu_unit`.

5. Config: VLEN_128 (build default per the define), `NUM_ALU=2`, `NUM_DIV=1`, `NUM_FMA=2` (if ZVE32F_ON), `NUM_MUL=2`. Note ZVE32F_ON is commented out in `GenerateBackendConfig` by default (line 404: `//\`define ZVE32F_ON`), so by default float is OFF. But the SoC config enables float (per prior lectures). I should be careful here — the default in GenerateBackendConfig has it commented, but that's the generated config; the actual production SoC enables float. I'll note float (falu/fdiv) is gated behind ZVE32F_ON compile flag.

6. Pipeline: ALU is essentially 2-stage (P0 comb in sub-units, P1 register stage for finalize). The addsub sub-unit itself is combinational; execution_p1 is a registered second stage. So ALU latency ~2 cycles.

7. The `is_cmp` routing: in rvv_backend_alu, when result_ready==2'b10, uop0 (which may be a cmp) is routed to unit1 only if not is_cmp — because cmp only runs on unit0 (CMP_SUPPORT=1).    - case 2'b11: both ready. uop0→unit0, uop1→unit1 (but uop1 not if cmp).

input.content:
# RVV ALU、浮点与除法算术单元

## 1. 本讲目标

学完本讲，你应当能够：

- 说清 RVV 后端里「算术类」处理单元（ALU / DIV / FALU / FDIV）各自的职责与数量配置。
- 在 `rvv_backend_alu_unit` 内部区分 **addsub / shift / mask / other** 四个一拍并行的子单元，并解释它们如何共用一条两拍流水。
- 解释整数向量除法为什么是**可变延迟**：恢复余数 + 前导零跳过的迭代式除法器，以及它如何用 `div_ready` 向派发端反压。
- 理解浮点向量算术（falu / fdiv）通过包装开源 `cvfpu`/`fpnew` 实现，并由 `ZVE32F_ON` 编译宏门控。
- 厘清 **Chisel 侧 `RvvAlu` 与 SV 侧 `rvv_backend_alu` 的边界**：前者只是枚举与译码中间表示，后者才是真正的执行电路。

## 2. 前置知识

本讲是第 7 单元（RVV 向量/矩阵后端）的一环，默认你已经读过：

- **u7-l1（RVV 后端总览）**：知道 RVV 后端是「Chisel 前端（RvvCore/译码/派发）+ SystemVerilog 后端（执行单元 + ROB + 退休）」的两段式结构。
- **u7-l2（RVV 译码与派发）**：知道一条向量指令被拆成 μop，经保留站（Reservation Station, RS）发射到各处理单元（Processing Unit, PU），结果再写回 ROB。
- **u7-l3（VRF/ROB/退休）**：知道结果经 `PU2ROB_t` 回灌 ROB、按序退休。

几个本讲反复出现的术语，先用一句话热身：

- **μop（micro-op）**：一条向量指令被拆成若干条更细粒度的操作（例如按 `uop_index` 分块），每条 μop 携带 `rob_entry`、操作码、源操作数等。
- **EEW（Effective Element Width）**：当前向量元素的位宽，取 `EEW8/EEW16/EEW32`（8/16/32 位）。同一份 128/256 位向量数据，按不同 EEW 切成不同数量的元素。
- **VLEN**：向量寄存器位宽。本仓库构建宏 `VLEN_128`（`VLEN=128`）；下面的乘法器/除法器阵列数量都随 VLEN 缩放。
- **vxrm / vxsat**：定点舍入模式与饱和标志（向量定点算术专属的「CSR」），舍入有 RNU/RNE/RDN/ROD 四种。
- **fpnew / cvfpu**：开源浮点 IP（PULP 平台 `fpnew`），CoralNPU 直接拿来当浮点执行电路。

## 3. 本讲源码地图

| 文件 | 角色 |
| --- | --- |
| [hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu.sv](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu.sv) | 向量 ALU 顶层：实例化 `NUM_ALU` 个单元，做双发射仲裁，cmp 指令只能进 0 号单元。 |
| [hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit.sv](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit.sv) | 单个 ALU 单元：并行挂 addsub/shift/mask/other 四个子单元，加一拍 P1 终结级。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_addsub.sv | 加/减/饱和/带进位/min-max/宽化子单元。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv | 移位/舍入移位/窄化/裁剪（clip）子单元。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_mask.sv | 逻辑与/或/异或、掩码归约、VID/VFIRST 等子单元。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_other.sv | VMERGE/VMV、符号/零扩展等「其它」逻辑子单元。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_execution_p1.sv | P1 终结级：比较结果合成、饱和、min/max 选择。 |
| [hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_div.sv](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_div.sv) | 向量除法顶层：按 `is_div` 把 μop 分给整数除法器或（可选）浮点除法器。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_div_unit.sv | 整数向量除法：把 VLEN 切成 8/16/32 位通道，阵列化实例化 `intdivider`。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_div_unit_divider.sv | 单 lane 的恢复余数迭代除法器（FSM + 前导零跳过）。 |
| [hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_falu.sv](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_falu.sv) | 浮点 ALU 顶层：把浮点 μop 按 addmul/cmp/cvt/tbl 分类，路由到 `NUM_FMA` 个 falu_unit。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_fdiv_unit.sv | 浮点除法/开方单元，包装 `fpnew_divsqrt_th_64_multi`。 |
| [hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/rvv/RvvAlu.scala](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/chisel/src/coralnpu/rvv/RvvAlu.scala) | Chisel 侧：仅用 `ChiselEnum` 枚举 ALU 操作码 + 一个译码中间表示 Bundle，**不实现任何算术**。 |
| hdl/verilog/rvv/inc/rvv_backend_define.svh | 关键宏：`NUM_ALU=2`、`NUM_DIV=1`、`NUM_FMA=2`、`ZVE32F_ON` 门控等。 |

## 4. 核心概念与源码讲解

### 4.1 向量 ALU 的子单元划分：addsub / shift / mask / other

#### 4.1.1 概念说明

向量 ALU 承担 RVV 里所有「按元素、一拍可完成」的整数逻辑算术：加减、min/max、逻辑运算、移位、定点舍入移位、窄化与裁剪（narrowing/clip）、掩码归约、merge/move、比较等。指令种类极多，但本质上可以按**数据通路形状**归为四类：

| 子单元 | 代表指令 | 通路特征 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **addsub** | `VADD/VSUB/VSADD/VSSUB/VADC/VMSEQ/VMIN/VMAX/VWADD…` | 逐字节加/减，含进位、饱和、宽化 |
| **shift** | `VSLL/VSRL/VSRA/VSSRL/VSSRA/VNSRL/VNCLIP/VNCLIPU` | 桶形移位 + vxrm 舍入 + 饱和 |
| **mask** | `VAND/VOR/VXOR/VMAND/VMOR/VMSBF/VID/VFIRST` | 逐位逻辑、掩码归约、元素编号 |
| **other** | `VMERGE/VMV/VZEXT/VSEXT/VSMUL` | 合并、扩展、标量搬运 |

四个子单元**同时**对同一份输入 μop 做译码与计算，每个子单元只在「这条指令属于我」时才把 `result_valid` 拉高——于是它们用 valid 信号互斥，天然不会撞车。这种「并行全算、valid 选通」的设计避免了在组合逻辑里串一张巨大的指令译码 Mux，时序更好。

#### 4.1.2 核心流程

一条 μop 进入 `rvv_backend_alu_unit` 后：

1. 拆出 `uop_funct6 / uop_funct3 / vs2_eew / vs1_data / vs2_data / rs1_data` 等字段，广播给四个子单元。
2. 每个子单元各自判断「我认不认这条指令」：认则 `result_valid_xxx_p0 = alu_uop_valid`，并产出 `result_xxx_p0`。
3. 顶层用 `case(1'b1)` 在四个 `result_valid_*_p0` 里**择一**，把胜出的结果送进 P1 寄存器（见 4.2）。

伪代码：

```text
if   addsub.recognizes(op): result_p0 = addsub(op, vs2, vs1); valid = ADDSUB
elif shift.recognizes(op):  result_p0 = shift(op, vs2, vs1, vxrm); valid = SHIFT
elif mask.recognizes(op):   result_p0 = mask(op, vs2, vs1, v0);  valid = MASK
elif other.recognizes(op):  result_p0 = other(op, vs2, vs1, v0); valid = OTHER
```

#### 4.1.3 源码精读

**四个子单元并行挂载**——注意它们共享同一组 `alu_uop_valid/alu_uop` 输入，各自只输出 `result_valid_*_p0`：[rvv_backend_alu_unit.sv:64-95](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit.sv#L64-L95) 实例化 `u_alu_addsub / u_alu_shift / u_alu_mask / u_alu_other`。

**addsub 的逐字节加/减**——把整条向量拆成 `VLENB` 个字节通道，每通道一个 9 位加法（含进位 `cout8`），由 `opcode` 在 `ADDSUB_VADD` 与 `ADDSUB_VSUB` 间二选一：[rvv_backend_alu_unit_addsub.sv:1528-1535](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_addsub.sv#L1528-L1535)。比较、min/max、带进位加减也复用这同一组加减法，只是 `opcode` 取 `VSUB`。

**shift 的桶形移位 + vxrm 舍入**——每个通道调用一个 `barrel_shifter`，左/逻辑右/算术右由 `shift_mode` 控制：[rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv:399-427](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv#L399-L427) 定 `shift_mode`；[rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv:433-466](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv#L433-L466) 实例化 `barrel_shifter`。移出的低位被保留为 `round_bits`，再按 `vxrm ∈ {RNU,RNE,RDN,ROD}` 决定是否 `+1`：[rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv:511-578](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv#L511-L578)。

**mask 的逐位逻辑 + 掩码归约**——逻辑运算直接用 `& / | / ^`；`VMSBF/VMSOF/VMSIF`（找首个/末个置位）用 `src2 & ~(src2-1)` 这类位技巧实现：[rvv_backend_alu_unit_mask.sv:243-269](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_mask.sv#L243-L269) 算出所有候选，[rvv_backend_alu_unit_mask.sv:291-374](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_mask.sv#L291-L374) 按 `funct6` 选最终结果。

> 说明：以上四个子单元文件都很长（addsub 约 1580 行、shift 约 1010 行），绝大多数篇幅是「按 EEW8/16/32 × OPIVV/OPIVX/OPIVI 把标量 `rs1` 广播成向量」的源数据准备表。阅读时**先跳过这些 for 循环数据搬运**，只盯 `result_valid` 译码表与最末的 `result_data` 计算段即可。

#### 4.1.4 代码实践

**实践目标**：在不跑仿真的前提下，靠「valid 译码表」给一条指令归类到具体子单元。

**操作步骤**：

1. 打开 `rvv_backend_alu_unit_addsub.sv`，找到 `always_comb begin ... result_valid = 'b0;` 段（约 L76-L287），列出它认的 `funct6` 集合。
2. 同样在 `rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv`（L99-L122）、`rvv_backend_alu_unit_mask.sv`（L106-L156）、`rvv_backend_alu_unit_other.sv`（L77 起）各列一份。
3. 任取三条指令 `vadd.vv`、`vssrl.vi`、`vmandn.mm`，分别查表判断它走哪个子单元。

**需要观察的现象**：四张表的 `funct6` 集合应当**两两不相交**——同一条指令不可能同时被两个子单元认领，否则顶层 `case(1'b1)` 会出多驱动冲突。

**预期结果**：`vadd` → addsub；`vssrl`（带舍入右移）→ shift；`vmandn`（掩码与非）→ mask。若你发现某指令同时出现在两张表里，说明你的理解有误，回到源码核对。

#### 4.1.5 小练习与答案

**练习 1**：为什么四个子单元要「同时算、用 valid 选」，而不是先译码出「属于谁」再只让那一个算？
**答案**：把译码 Mux 拆进各子单元、用 `result_valid` 互斥选通，可以让每条子通路的关键路径更短、布局更规整；同时各子单元可独立综合与验证。代价是少量冗余翻转（没被选中的子单元也在算），但向量 ALU 一拍出结果，这点功耗可接受。

**练习 2**：`vnclipu`（无符号窄化裁剪）属于哪个子单元？它的饱和结果存在哪个字段？
**答案**：属于 shift 子单元（见 [rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv:801-872](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_shift.sv#L801-L872)），饱和信息写进 `result.vsaturate`（`upoverflow`），由后续 VXSAT 累加。

### 4.2 ALU 顶层双发射、cmp 专用单元与两拍流水

#### 4.2.1 概念说明

`rvv_backend_alu` 是 ALU 的「车间主任」：它从 ALU 保留站一次最多收 2 条 μop（`NUM_ALU=2`），分派给两个 ALU 单元，再把两路结果交还 ROB。这里有两个关键约束：

1. **cmp 指令只能进 0 号单元**：只有 `u_alu_cmp_unit` 把参数 `CMP_SUPPORT` 设为 1（[rvv_backend_alu.sv:95-97](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu.sv#L95-L97)），其余单元 `CMP_SUPPORT=0`。所以比较类指令是结构冒险源——一个周期最多只发一条 cmp。
2. **ALU 是两拍流水**：P0 在子单元里组合算出原始和/差/移位值；P1 是寄存器级 `rvv_backend_alu_unit_execution_p1`，负责把原始结果「终结」成最终值（合成比较、min/max 选择、饱和判定）。

#### 4.2.2 核心流程

派发仲裁（简化）：

```text
读 result_ready[1:0]（ROB 是否能收两路结果）
  2'b11: uop0→unit0, uop1→unit1（uop1 不能是 cmp）
  2'b01: uop0→unit0, unit1 空闲
  2'b10: uop0→unit1，但仅当 uop0 不是 cmp
```

单条 μop 在 unit 内的流水：

```text
P0(组合): addsub/shift/mask/other 之一算出 result_*_p0
   ↓ 锁存一拍
P1(寄存器): execution_p1 做比较合成/饱和/min-max → result_p1
   ↓ result_valid 上报 ROB
```

#### 4.2.3 源码精读

**双发射仲裁**——用 `result_ready` 决定能否同时喂两条 μop，并对 cmp 做特殊放行：[rvv_backend_alu.sv:58-93](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu.sv#L58-L93)。注意 `2'b10` 分支里 `alu_valid[1] = uop_valid[0] & (!uop[0].is_cmp)`——cmp 不能借道 unit1。

**cmp 专用单元实例化**——0 号单元带 `CMP_SUPPORT(1'b1)`，其余由 `for (i=1; i<NUM_ALU; ...)` 生成：[rvv_backend_alu.sv:95-131](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu.sv#L95-L131)。

**P0→P1 的择一与锁存**——顶层用 `case({result_valid_p1, 任一p0_valid})` 管理流水占用，并在 `case(1'b1)` 里从四个 p0 结果中选一个打入 `alu_uop_p1`：[rvv_backend_alu_unit.sv:99-159](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit.sv#L99-L159)。

**P1 终结级**——`execution_p1` 承接锁存后的 `PIPE_DATA_t`，做比较结果合成与饱和：[rvv_backend_alu_unit_execution_p1.sv:9-90](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu_unit_execution_p1.sv#L9-L90) 声明了 `is_cmp`、各 EEW 的 `product/minmax`、溢出标志等中间量。

#### 4.2.4 代码实践

**实践目标**：用一个具体场景验证「cmp 一周期一条」的结构冒险。

**操作步骤**：

1. 假设派发端同周期给出两条 μop：`uop[0] = vmseq`（比较，`is_cmp=1`）、`uop[1] = vadd`。
2. 假设此时 ROB 两路都 ready（`result_ready = 2'b11`）。
3. 套用 [rvv_backend_alu.sv:76-83](https://github.com/google-coral/coralnpu/blob/a8281b0d5701d8939cf9ea424b1cd34e18c43230/hdl/verilog/rvv/design/rvv_backend_alu.sv#L76-L83) 的 `2'b11` 分支计算 `alu_valid[1]`。

**需要观察的现象**：`alu_valid[1] = uop_valid[1] & (!uop[1].is_cmp)`，由于 `uop[1]` 是 vadd（非 cmp），可进 unit1；`uop[0]` 是 vmseq 进 unit0。两条都能发。但如果把两条都换成 `vmseq`，`uop[1]` 会被 `!is_cmp` 屏蔽，只能发一条。

**预期结果**：连续两条 cmp 不能同周期双发——这正是派发端做结构冒险检测时要向 ROB 报告的约束。具体反压由派发器实现，本讲只确认 ALU 侧的硬约束来源。

#### 4.2.5 小练习与答案

**练习 1**：为什么 cmp 不像 addsub 那样在所有单元都实现？
**答案**：cmp 需要额外的「逐元素比较 → 压成一位/掩码」的终结逻辑（在 `execution_p1` 里），面积与连线代价高；而 ML 负载里比较指令占比低。只在一个单元配 `CMP_SUPPORT=1` 是面积与吞吐的折中，代价是 cmp 成为结构冒险点。

**练习 2**：ALU 的「两拍」分别由谁构成？为什么 addsub 自己是组合的却还要 P1？
**答案**：P0 是四个子单元的组合计算，P1 是 `execution_p1` 寄存器级（做比较合成/饱和/min-max）。即便 addsub 一拍能算出和/差，比较与饱和的终结逻辑路径较长，拆到 P1 是为了收敛时序。
